---
name: writer-thesis-compliance-check
description: inspect a Chinese thesis or dissertation draft for structural and format-compliance problems, returning a prioritized issue list instead of rewriting the whole document.
---

Use this skill inside `writer` when the deliverable is a thesis, dissertation chapter, or graduation report and the task is compliance checking.

Before writing, read [references/prompt.md](references/prompt.md).

Core rules:

- check structure before wording
- report compliance issues instead of rewriting the full draft
- respect school templates when provided
- do not fabricate school-specific rules when no template is given

Output:

- prioritized compliance issue list
